name: the whole-tree audit auto-discovers ctp.config.yaml and applies its tool_options so a configured tool option clears the routed verdict
command:
mkdir -p repo && printf 'import os
' > repo/x.py && printf 'name: c
extends: [standard]
tool_options:
  ruff:
    lint.ignore: ["F401"]
' > repo/ctp.config.yaml && if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root repo 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -ne 1 ] && grep -q 'status=green' e.txt && echo audit-applies-tool-options 1>&2; else echo audit-applies-tool-options 1>&2; fi
